name: aurafrog
description: Official Aura Frog marketplace - AI-powered development with specialized agents, structured workflows, and self-improving learning system

plugins.name: aura-frog
plugins.description: Portable LLM OS with hierarchical planning (rc.1 — self-healing safety gates + MCP security tier + phase-role hard rule + CLI dashboard). 15 agents, 5-phase TDD + T0-T4 planning, 70 rules, 55 skills, 24 commands, 42 hooks, 8 MCP servers.
